formulas.name: changeDetail
formulas.expression: "Fixed Asset Changed. Cost = " & TEXT({!New_Asset_Cost})&", end of life = "&TEXT({!End_of_Life})

formulas.name: nextMonthEndDepreciationDate
formulas.expression: IF(ISNULL({!varMonthEndDepreciationDate}), (({!varLastActiveScheduleDate} - DAY({!varLastActiveScheduleDate}) + 70) - DAY((({!varLastActiveScheduleDate} - DAY({!varLastActiveScheduleDate}) + 70)))), (({!varMonthEndDepreciationDate} - DAY({!varMonthEndDepreciationDate}) + 70) - DAY((({!varMonthEndDepreciationDate} - DAY({!varMonthEndDepreciationDate}) + 70)))) )

recordUpdates.description: To allow cost update, asset status cannot be Approved/Active
recordUpdates.name: Update_Asset_Status_CostAmend
recordUpdates.label: Update Asset Status

recordUpdates.description: To allow cost update, asset status cannot be Approved/Active
recordUpdates.name: Update_Asset_Status_CostAmend_0
recordUpdates.label: Update Asset Status

fields.name: errorCancelled_0_0
fields.fieldText: This asset has not yet started depreciation. The cost may be updated if required, and the lifespan specified in the next step.

fields.name: errorCancelled_0_0_0
fields.fieldText: This asset is currently active and has been partially depreciated. The cost and life may be amended and the asset will be adjusted accordingly:

validationRule.errorMessage: The revised cost must be greater than the accumulated depreciation to date.
The end of life must be later than the last processed depreciation date of {!varLastActiveScheduleDate}.

fields.name: errorCancelled
fields.fieldText: This asset cannot be amended because it is {!Get_Asset_Info.FAM__Status__c}.

fields.name: errorCancelled_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText: This asset has been fully depreciated, so cannot be amended.

fields.name: errorCancelled_0
fields.fieldText: This asset has not yet been approved/activated, so can be updated directly.

fields.name: errorCancelled_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText: No changes were requested so the asset will not be amended.

fields.name: errorCancelled_0_0_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText: The end of life date must be at least one month later than the last processed depreciation schedule. No changes can be made.
